# Python Fundamental Code 

This skill covers the foundational elements of Python programming including best practices of syntax, data types, control structures, functions, object-oriented programming, docstrings, and the standard library.

## When to use this skill

1. Write clean and efficient Python pure code using built-in data structures and functions.

## Best practices for writing Python code

1. Use brief comments that elucidate the purpose of code blocks, and highlight any non-obvious logic or decisions.
